center.name: 跨墨西哥火山帶
center.summary: 跨墨西哥火山帶是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括灰胸丛鸦、Gray-barred wren、Rufous-crowned sparrow等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate is found in the Trans-Mexican Volcanic Belt from Jalisco and Michoacán east to western Puebla

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This passerine is primarily found across the Southwestern United States and much of the interior of Mexico, south to the transverse mountain range, and to the Pacific coast to the southwest of the transverse range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rusty-crowned ground sparrow is found in western Mexico's Sierra Madre Occidental, Sierra Madre del Sur, and Cordillera Neovolcanica

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Transvolcanic jay derives its name from its range in the Transvolcanic Belt of south-central Mexico
